sentences.text: And thank you for calling coastline real estate Advisors. Please note that calls may be recorded for quality and training purposes our normal business hours are from eight AM to five PM Monday through Friday for more information visit our website coastline R E a dot. Com to speak to our front office press one for maintenance requests press two to reach one of our leasing agents press three to reach our accounting team press four, if you know your party's extension you may dial it at anytime for all other inquiries press zero. Hi, this is what I don't know. Thank you record your message at the tone press any key or stop talking to and they're recording.
